name: Nimbu Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice.
2. Heat oil and add mustard seeds, urad dal, chana dal, cashews, raisins, turmeric, and mixed vegetables.
3. Fry the ingredients until they are well-cooked.
4. Mix the fried ingredients with the cooked rice.
5. Squeeze the lemon juice into the rice and mix thoroughly.
